title: rhinanthus minor subsp. stenophyllus
intro: Rhinanthus minor subsp. stenophyllus, also known as the slender or narrow-leaved yellow-rattle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by attaching itself to the roots of grasses and other plants, particularly those in the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Rhinanthus minor subsp. stenophyllus include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health.
